entries.name: 🎨 主题CSS注入
entries.replaceString: <style>.mes_text{background:#0c1020!important;border:1.5px solid #0369a1!important;border-radius:6px 16px 16px 16px!important;padding:18px 20px 22px!important;color:#e0f2fe!important;font-size:14.5px!important;line-height:1.85!important;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.6),inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.04)!important;position:relative!important;overflow:visible!important;}.mes_text::before{content:""!important;position:absolute!important;top:-1px!important;left:20px!important;right:20px!important;height:2px!important;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#38bdf8,transparent)!important;border-radius:1px!important;}.mes_text::after{content:"🎭"!important;position:absolute!important;bottom:12px!important;right:16px!important;font-size:24px!important;opacity:.06!important;pointer-events:none!important;user-select:none!important;}.mes_text p,.mes_text li,.mes_text span:not([class]){color:#e0f2fe!important;}.mes_text strong,.mes_text b{color:#38bdf8!important;font-weight:800!important;}.mes_text em,.mes_text i{color:#818cf8!important;font-style:italic!important;}.mes_text h1,.mes_text h2,.mes_text h3{color:#38bdf8!important;font-weight:800!important;margin:14px 0 8px!important;letter-spacing:.5px!important;}.mes_text hr{border:none!important;border-top:1px solid #0369a1!important;margin:16px 0!important;opacity:.6!important;}.mes_text table{width:100%!important;border-collapse:separate!important;border-spacing:0!important;margin:14px 0!important;background:rgba(0,0,0,.35)!important;border:1px solid #075985!important;border-radius:10px!important;overflow:hidden!important;}.mes_text th{background:#0c2340!important;color:#38bdf8!important;padding:10px 13px!important;font-size:12px!important;font-weight:700!important;letter-spacing:1.2px!important;text-align:left!important;border-bottom:1px solid #075985!important;}.mes_text td{padding:9px 13px!important;font-size:13.5px!important;color:#7dd3fc!important;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05)!important;vertical-align:middle!important;}.mes_text tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none!important;}.mes_text td:first-child{color:#e0f2fe!important;font-weight:600!important;}.mes_text code{background:rgba(0,0,0,.3)!important;color:#38bdf8!important;padding:3px 8px!important;border-radius:5px!important;font-size:12px!important;border:1px solid #075985!important;}.mes_text blockquote{border-left:3px solid #38bdf8!important;background:rgba(0,0,0,.25)!important;padding:10px 14px!important;margin:10px 0!important;color:#7dd3fc!important;font-style:italic!important;border-radius:0 8px 8px 0!important;}.gm-panel{background:#060c18!important;border:1px solid #075985!important;border-radius:12px!important;margin:16px 0!important;overflow:hidden!important;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.5)!important;}.gm-title{background:#0c2340!important;color:#38bdf8!important;padding:9px 14px!important;font-size:11.5px!important;font-weight:800!important;letter-spacing:2px!important;border-bottom:1px solid #075985!important;text-transform:uppercase!important;}.gm-body{padding:13px 14px!important;}.gm-row{display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;margin-bottom:9px!important;gap:10px!important;}.gm-lbl{font-size:11px!important;color:#7dd3fc!important;min-width:48px!important;flex-shrink:0!important;letter-spacing:.3px!important;}.gm-track{flex:1!important;height:7px!important;background:rgba(255,255,255,.07)!important;border-radius:4px!important;overflow:hidden!important;}.gm-fill{height:100%!important;border-radius:4px!important;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#0284c7,#38bdf8)!important;}.gm-num{font-size:11px!important;font-weight:700!important;color:#38bdf8!important;min-width:26px!important;text-align:right!important;}.gm-char{display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;gap:10px!important;padding:9px 10px!important;margin-bottom:7px!important;background:rgba(0,0,0,.25)!important;border-radius:9px!important;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06)!important;}.gm-ava{width:34px!important;height:34px!important;border-radius:50%!important;background:#0c2340!important;border:1.5px solid #075985!important;display:flex!important;align-items:center!important;justify-content:center!important;font-size:16px!important;flex-shrink:0!important;}.gm-cn{font-size:13px!important;font-weight:700!important;color:#e0f2fe!important;}.gm-cs{font-size:10.5px!important;color:#7dd3fc!important;margin-top:2px!important;}.gm-clue{padding:8px 12px!important;margin-bottom:7px!important;background:rgba(0,0,0,.22)!important;border-left:3px solid #38bdf8!important;border-radius:0 7px 7px 0!important;font-size:13px!important;color:#e0f2fe!important;line-height:1.6!important;}.gm-cnum{display:inline-block!important;font-size:10px!important;color:#38bdf8!important;font-weight:800!important;margin-right:6px!important;letter-spacing:.5px!important;}.gm-sep{height:1px!important;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#075985,transparent)!important;margin:10px 0!important;}.gm-badge{display:inline-block!important;padding:2px 9px!important;border-radius:4px!important;font-size:10px!important;font-weight:700!important;margin:2px!important;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06)!important;color:#38bdf8!important;border:1px solid #075985!important;}</style>$1
